value_chain_position: Develops and sells neurovascular and vascular intervention devices including aspiration catheters, flow diverters, and a robotic endovascular platform (Robotic Assisted Vascular Catheter); earns per-procedure consumable pull-through.
relative_comps: Penumbra's XTRACT-M aspiration system for large-vessel occlusion stroke is a genuine market-share gainer against Stryker and Medtronic. Its robotic endovascular catheter system, while early, is one of the few robotic platforms in neurovascular intervention — a segment ISRG does not address. Revenue CAGR of 18.3% and 17.3% YoY growth with 15% FCF margin at $1.45B revenue support the robotics_automation tag. Load-bearing score of 4 because installed robotic platforms create consumable pull-through with high switching costs; capital equipment placements lock in recurring catheter revenue.
